nasb.text: And I will punish on that day all who leap on the temple threshold, Who fill the house of their lord with violence and deceit.

esv.text: On that day I will punish everyone who leaps over the threshold, and those who fill their master’s house with violence and fraud.

cnv.text: 到那日，我必懲罰所有跳過門檻的， 所有使強暴和欺詐充滿主人房屋的。”

ccb.text: 到那日，我必惩罚所有跳过门槛、 使主人的家充满暴力和欺诈的人。
